concerns.text: T009 (Contract test for dataset schema) appears in Phase 3 before T004 (Create dataset schema contract) in Phase 2. Contract tests cannot execute without the schema contract existing first. T009 must follow T004.

T020 (Contract test for analysis schema) appears in Phase 4 before T005 (Create analysis schema contract) in Phase 2. Contract tests depend on the schema contract being created first. T020 must follow T005.

T031 (Contract test for visualization schema) appears in Phase 5 before T006 (Create visualization schema contract) in Phase 2. Contract tests depend on the schema contract being created first. T031 must follow T006.

T017 (Create sample dataset for testing) is placed at the END of US1 implementation tasks (T011-T016), but T011-T016 need sample data to test against. T017 must precede T011-T016 as a producer before consumer.

T043 (Create data-model.md) is in Phase 6, but data-model.md defines entities that contracts (T004-T006) reference. Per Foundational-first ordering, T043 must be in Phase 2 before contract creation tasks.

T034 (Implement sensitivity analysis for experience thresholds) is in US3 (Visualization) but implements logic in code/analysis/sensitivity.py which is part of the analysis module. This creates a cross-story dependency; T034 belongs in US2 (Analysis) where the analysis module is implemented.
